Default Prove-Up In Scd
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Papina Thompson.
Josh Brownstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kevin Brunner, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Karla Keyser as follows:
Damages/Principal $36,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,444.49
Costs $445.50, for a total of $37,889.99
Judgment signed in open court.
